setup: E5 (K(Lan->Lan) direct measurement): Alpaca's Gordon-led FC1 T1 Lancer (panel 434.3/414.6, Gordon Lv64 aura +251.6) vs Mueller's Gordon-led T1 Lancer (415.7/405.9, Lv51 aura +236.6). Attacker kills at turn 21 (triple Gordon-cadence intersection).

turn_inference.cadence: S1 every 2nd, S2 every 3rd, S3 every 4th turn (floor(T/n); 2026-07-19 model, cross-validated in E3b)
assumptions: both sides' Gordon counters identical (10/7/5) -- same battle length, consistent

notes: K(Lan->Lan) DIRECT MEASUREMENT (Gordon-instrument, both kits present): Lancer mirror is counter-passive-free; K_eff computed in the analysis (compare the NanoMart-implied ~176 vs the factorized 149.8).
First double-Gordon battle: both copies' counters identical (10/7/5) at T=21 -- cadence model self-consistent across levels 51/64.
Alpaca attacker = FC1 T1 Lancer; Mueller defender = ordinary T1 Lancer (FC1-base convention applies to both).
